title: rubus velicaulis
intro: Rubus velicaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus velicaulis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Rubus velicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
